overall_note: Issue I-5 (groundTruth exclusion) requires team decision before final close
build_note: ESLint warning: nextVitals is not iterable (non-blocking, Next.js 15 plugin compat issue)

mysuit_ocr_history.write: appendHistoryRun(), updateHistoryRun() — try/catch with QuotaExceededError fallback (50→30→15→5→1)
mysuit_ocr_history.delete_all: clearHistoryRuns() — no try/catch (no callers, low risk)

mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles.read: readRestoreProfiles() — try/catch, Array.isArray check, returns [] on error
mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles.write: writeRestoreProfiles() — no internal try/catch; callers wrap in try/catch
mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles.delete: deleteRestoreProfile(businessNo, partyType) — reads via guarded path, then writes

localStorage.cross_contamination_evidence: historyStore and restoreProfileStore have no cross-imports. autofillEngine reads both but writes neither. deleteRestoreProfile() only writes mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles. deleteHistoryRun() only writes mysuit_ocr_history.

autofill_priority.groundTruth_dead_code: readGroundTruthCandidateRecords() defined at autofillEngine.ts:271 but never called after 2C

A_restore_profile_priority.label: restore profile 후보 있음
A_restore_profile_priority.detail: collectInternalAutofillCandidates(): matchingRestore.length > 0 → immediate return, no mixing with history

A1_empty_field_guard.label: restore profile 빈 필드 비덮어쓰기
A1_empty_field_guard.detail: readRestoreProfileCandidates() filters with isEmptyOcrValue() + isMeaninglessValue() before adding to candidates

A2_sourceType.label: sourceType: restoreProfile 설정
A2_sourceType.detail: readRestoreProfileCandidates() sets sourceType: 'restoreProfile' on each candidate

B1_user_edited_filter.label: isUserEditedHistoryField 필터 유지
B1_user_edited_filter.detail: isUserEditedHistoryField() logic preserved: source=text OR modified≠original

B2_allowlist.label: history fallback allowlist 5개 유지
B2_allowlist.detail: candidateFields limited to: companyName, businessNumber, representative, tel, address (normalized keys)

C_no_candidates.label: 둘 다 없음 — 후보 없음 상태
C_no_candidates.detail: status='no_candidates', candidateCount=0, message='자동복원: 같은 사업자번호의 저장 기록 없음', no crash

D_delete_isolation.label: Restore 삭제 후 동작 + history 무영향
D_delete_isolation.detail: deleteRestoreProfile() only writes mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles. mysuit_ocr_history untouched.

E_partial_fields.label: 일부 필드만 있는 restore profile
E_partial_fields.detail: Empty fields filtered in readRestoreProfileCandidates(). applyAutofillToOutputFields() preserves currentValue when no valid auto suggestion for a field.

F2_history_detail.label: History 상세 UI 회귀
F2_history_detail.detail: DetailHistoryView.tsx: [저장] unchanged, [자동복원 후보 저장] added, output_fields display unchanged

F4_preview.label: RunOCR Preview UI 회귀
F4_preview.detail: OcrResultPanel.tsx type imports only, rendering logic unchanged

G_localstorage_safety.label: localStorage 안전성
G_localstorage_safety.detail: See localStorage section above. Cross-contamination: none. Parse guards: both keys. Sort: descending. Dedup: businessNo+partyType.

checks.update_merge_no_overwrite: PASS — handleRestoreConfirmOk() spreads existing.fields, overwrites only if !isMeaninglessValue(val)

issues.title: ESLint warning: nextVitals is not iterable
issues.symptom: Printed during npm run build, non-blocking
issues.impact: None on runtime. CI/CD may fail if ESLint configured as error.
issues.fix_candidate: Update eslint-config-next or disable nextVitals rule

issues.title: writeRestoreProfiles() has no internal QuotaExceededError handling
issues.symptom: May throw on localStorage full without graceful fallback
issues.impact: Low — callers catch the error. No granular fallback unlike historyStore.
issues.fix_candidate: Add QuotaExceededError handling inside writeRestoreProfiles() consistent with historyStore pattern

issues.title: clearHistoryRuns() has no try/catch
issues.fix_candidate: Add try/catch if callers are added

issues.title: allSame check is one-directional in handleSaveRestoreProfile
issues.symptom: If existing profile has fields not in newProfile, may report allSame incorrectly
issues.impact: Practically none — RestoreProfileFields has exactly 4 fixed keys
issues.fix_candidate: Bidirectional comparison or iterate over PROFILE_FIELD_LABELS keys

issues.title: groundTruth candidates excluded from autofill after HISTORY-RESTORE-2C
issues.symptom: mysuit_ocr_groundtruth data no longer used for autofill suggestions
reproduction_steps: 1. Click [저장] in History detail → data saved to mysuit_ocr_groundtruth
3. groundTruth values NOT applied as autofill (excluded from collectInternalAutofillCandidates)
issues.cause: HISTORY-RESTORE-2C rewrote collectInternalAutofillCandidates(). Old: [...readGroundTruthCandidateRecords(), ...readHistoryCandidateRecords()]. New: restoreProfile > history only. readGroundTruthCandidateRecords() is now dead code.
fix_candidates: Option A: Re-add groundTruth as 3rd priority in collectInternalAutofillCandidates()
Option B: Confirm exclusion as policy, delete readGroundTruthCandidateRecords()
Option C: Include groundTruth only when both restoreProfile and history return no candidates

conclusion.close_2c: CONDITIONAL — confirm I-5 groundTruth exclusion intent
runtime_items: Actual OCR run → mysuit_ocr_history entry written
Save restore profile button → mysuit_ocr_restore_profiles entry appears in /autorestore
Second OCR same bizno → autofill from restoreProfile applied
Delete restore profile → history fallback autofill activated
Full UI flow: /history → detail → [자동복원 후보 저장] → /autorestore → verify
